title: campylospermum deltoideum
intro: Campylospermum deltoideum is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Ochnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Campylospermum deltoideum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
